name: Casey Morgan
resume_text:
Casey Morgan
Email: casey.morgan.eval@example.com
Customer Support Associate, Beacon Helpdesk, 2022-2025
Handled 45-60 email and chat tickets per day for a B2B SaaS helpdesk product. Used Zendesk macros, reproduced customer-reported bugs, attached screenshots and browser details for engineering, and followed up with customers after escalation. Maintained a 94 percent CSAT average over the last four quarters.
Customer Operations Intern, Beacon Helpdesk, 2021-2022
Updated help center articles and tagged recurring product questions.
Skills: Zendesk, ticket triage, bug reproduction, customer communication, help center documentation.
human_notes: Strong support match; interview should validate de-escalation and backlog prioritization.
